title: wendlandia uvariifolia subsp. rotundifolia
intro: Wendlandia uvariifolia subsp. rotundifolia is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Indian Tutsan or small Indian Tutsan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wendlandia uvariifolia subsp. rotundifolia include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
